note: App layer recovered from undisassembled indirect-dispatch gap 0x34c6-0x4a2b (main_init + handlers). Classified via 8-agent workflow. Rearlight is the same firmware family.

vanmoof.name: frontlight_render_frame
vanmoof.role: core LED frame/animation renderer: gamma-LUT expand of packed 4-bit channels, master-brightness scale (val*master/0xff), drives per-LED + PWM

vanmoof.name: frontlight_pwm_set_duty
vanmoof.role: LED PWM duty writer (brightness -> SCTimer match regs 0x40085100/200; special-case 100%)

vanmoof.name: frontlight_led_channel_write
vanmoof.role: per-channel LED PWM/SCTimer register write (core driver primitive)

vanmoof.name: frontlight_led_set_brightness
vanmoof.role: set LED channel (0..15) brightness via led_channel_write

vanmoof.name: frontlight_frame_table_store
vanmoof.role: store an LED frame into the 300-entry frame table (bounds-checked)

vanmoof.name: frontlight_od_signal_register
vanmoof.role: build a node-0x87 CAN-OD descriptor + register/publish (from main_init)

deferred_vendor_anchors.0x34dc: main_init — SDK bring-up + FreeRTOS task creation + OD signal registration (deferred)
deferred_vendor_anchors.0x15e0: LED/SCTimer driver callback (hal) used by led_channel_write

unsure.role: reads two globals, returns 0/1/2 status code (possible light-state/ready query; low confidence)
